_meta.purpose: Source attribution for published indicators whose source_documents were empty. ADDS citations only; never hides or deletes any indicator. User directive 2026-06-03: NO BRAUN in the atlas. The subnational set is attributed from its already-attributed twin indicators (all non-Braun). The national economic set is NOT attributed here because its source was lost and could not be confirmed as non-Braun; it is cleared to 'source_pending' (kept visible, no Braun citation) for resolution next session.

ANUARIO_1860_SCHOOLS: Oficina Central de Estadística. 1861. Anuario Estadístico de la República de Chile, año 1860 (Tomo I), schools by province, 1853–1858. Santiago: Imprenta Nacional.
MAMALAKIS_V2: Mamalakis, Markos. 1980. Historical Statistics of Chile, Volume 2: Demography and Labor Force. Westport, CT: Greenwood Press.
VEJARES_COMPILATION: Véjares, Maximiliano. Forthcoming. Department-level historical dataset, Chile, 19th century (legislator–landowner linkage). Net Zero Industrial Policy Lab, Johns Hopkins University.

matrimonios_total: Oficina Central de Estadística. 1872. Anuario Estadístico de la República de Chile, año 1871. Santiago: Imprenta Nacional.
Ministerio del Interior. 1891. Memoria del Ministerio del Interior, año 1890, Tomo II. Santiago.
pct_protestante_prov: Dirección General de Estadística. Censo de Población de Chile, cuadro de religión por provincia. Santiago. (source to confirm)
